case_title: PACIFIC AUTOMOTIVE CO. VS. LIAO, EYHNALDO DBA UNVERSAL CLASS AUT REAPIR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIAO, REYNALDO DBA UNIVERSAL CLASS AUTO REPAIR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC AUTOMOTIVE CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIAO, REYNALDO DBA UNIVERSAL CLASS AUTO REPAIR THE AGREEMENT WAS MADE WITH A CORPORATION, NOT THE INDIVIDUAL SUED IN THIS CASE. ALL BILLS WERE SENT TO THE CORPORATION, NOT THE INDIVIDUAL. THIS JUDGMENT IS MADE WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO SUE THE CORPORATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
